sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Appropriation Act, 1984
sections.text: 1. This Act may be cited as the Appropriation Act, 1984. Short title

2. (1) On the authority of a. warrant issued by the President, Approprie,.
there may bt: expended from the general revenues of the tion
Republic such moneys, not exceod:ing in the aggregate one
thousand and fifty-five million, five hundred o.nd forty-four
thousand, one hundred and twenty-one kwacho., as may be
required for the services of the Republic during the financial
year ending on the 31st December, 1984.
(2) The moneys mentioned in subsection (1) shall be ap­
propriated to the services of the Republic mentioned in the
second column of the Schedula in amounts not exceeding the
amounts indicated in the third column thereof.
(3) On the written authority of the Permanent Secretary,
Ministry of Finance, the amounts shown under the sub-heads
of the estimates may be varied:
Provided that-
(i) the amounts appropriated to each Head shall not
thereby be altered; and
(ii) any of the amounts shown under Head 320 or 321
shall not he varierl.
